FUNCTION
The WHOLE EARTH CATALOG functions as an evaluation and access 4
device. With it, the user should know better what is worth getting and-
where and how to do the getting. ‘
An item is listed in the CATALOG if it is deemed: : |
1) Useful as a tool, Ata aad y eae
2) Relevant to independent Leleater
3) High quality or low cost,
4) Easily available by mail.
CATALOG listings are continually revised according to the experience , i
and suggestions of CATALOG users and staff.
